summary: Completed comprehensive OAuth testing for ForJenta - Google OAuth via Emergent Auth and GitHub integration fully implemented and functional
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint returns 'ForJenta API v2.0.0'
Auth session endpoint validates input correctly (422 for missing session_id)
Auth /me endpoint requires authentication (401 without auth)
GitHub connect endpoint requires authentication (401 without auth)
GitHub repos endpoint requires authentication (401 without auth)
Login page loads with 'Continue with Google' button
Signup page loads with 'Continue with Google' button
Google OAuth buttons have correct text and are clickable
Page headings and trial information display properly
